task_completion.description: Verify that the bookmarks bar contains the four specified operational folders and no personal bookmarks.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Chrome bookmarks bar or Bookmark Manager shows exactly four folders: 'SCADA & Telemetry', 'Weather & Irradiance', 'Grid Market Data', and 'Equipment Docs'. No other unrelated or personal bookmarks are visible on the bar.

task_completion.description: Verify the Chrome font size is set to 22 for high-glare visibility.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In Chrome Settings -> Appearance, the 'Custom font size' or 'Font size' setting is explicitly set to 22.

task_completion.description: Verify 'Overlay Scrollbars' and 'Smooth Scrolling' flags are enabled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the chrome://flags page, the entries for 'Overlay Scrollbars' and 'Smooth Scrolling' are visible and their respective dropdown menus are set to 'Enabled'.

task_completion.description: Verify a custom search engine shortcut is created for 'fault'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In Chrome Settings -> Search engine -> Manage search engines and site search, there is an entry with the shortcut/keyword 'fault' pointing to a URL containing 'inverter-faults-db.com'.

task_completion.description: Verify the homepage is set to CAISO.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In Chrome Settings -> Appearance -> Show Home button, the custom web address field is filled with a URL containing 'caiso.com'.

task_completion.description: Verify the download directory is set to SCADA_Exports and the download prompt is enabled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In Chrome Settings -> Downloads, the 'Location' path ends in 'SCADA_Exports' (e.g., ~/Documents/SCADA_Exports), and the toggle for 'Ask where to save each file before downloading' is turned ON.

task_completion.description: Verify password saving and autofill are disabled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In Chrome Settings -> Autofill and passwords (or Password Manager), the toggles for 'Offer to save passwords' and 'Auto Sign-in' are turned OFF.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Chrome GUI to make changes rather than editing configuration files directly via terminal.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Chrome browser settings pages, bookmark manager, and chrome://flags interface being interacted with, rather than a terminal window with text editors (like nano or vim) modifying Chrome's JSON files (Preferences, Local State, etc.).

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual Chrome application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser window has standard Chrome UI elements (address bar, tabs, settings menu, bookmarks bar) and is not a spoofed window, a text document, or a mock HTML page.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not just write the expected answers into a text file to simulate completion.
integrity.visual_evidence: The configuration values (like 'caiso.com', '22', 'SCADA_Exports') must be visible inside the actual Chrome Settings interface, not just typed into a text editor or terminal output.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected bookmark folders: 'SCADA & Telemetry', 'Weather & Irradiance', 'Grid Market Data', 'Equipment Docs'. Expected font size: 22. Expected Chrome flags to enable: 'overlay-scrollbars' and 'smooth-scrolling'. Search engine keyword: 'fault' targeting 'inverter-faults-db.com'. Download directory: 'SCADA_Exports'. Homepage domain: 'caiso.com'.
